017d78e6c5843669bbccc96e56d3da89.description: Located on the island of Molokai's gorgeous west end sits this upstairs two bedroom/ 2 bath condo at Ke Nani Kai Resort. Condo features beautiful tile floors throughout and out on to the partially covered lanai. The condo has a full kitchen with full size refrigerator, stove, dishwasher and plenty cabinet space. The washer/dryer are full size and moved into the storage area on the lanai. One closet is the washer/dryer and other closet is for additional storage. This added an additional closet space in kitchen area for a pantry. There is a small loft above that one can leave their surf boards or bikes when not here. Condo is situated directly across from the pool area where the amenities included a jacuzzi, gas BBQ’s, 2 bathrooms, soda machine, lounge chairs and table and chairs for eating, along with 2 tennis/pickle ball courts. It is a very short walk down the roadway to some of Molokai's best beaches. Kepuhi is great in winter months for surfing and in summer months the sparkling waters in front are great for swimming. Also close to some of the great spots for off shore fishing. The $1155 HOA covers, water, cable/internet, trash, private sewer, grounds and outside maintenance. Another small HOA is West Molokai Assoc. It’s $75 a year. Near by Ke Nani Kai is Maunaloa town, a 5 minute drive with a market open daily, a 5 minute walk to the Sundry Shop down by Kepuhi Beach, 10 minutes to airport and 25/30 minutes to Kaunakakai town for all the shopping or eateries. Make for a nice place to come visit and stay. Owner holds an active license in mainland. On the Minotoya list, Google about Bill 9.

08c01eed259f5ba17ff1b6922e2d8454.description: Perched on Molokai's Scenic west end in the Papohaku Ranchlands, this cottage offers the ideal blend of privacy, space and proximity to some of the islands most breathtaking beaches. Kepuhi Beach is known for winter surf, Make Horse is known for its tide pools, and Papohaku Beach is known for long beach walks. This property captures the essence of relaxed island living. This cottage is a perfect starter home for a young couple or a couple scaling down in life. Inside the home features high open beach ceilings that create a bright and airy atmosphere throughout the spacious great room. The kitchen is thoughtfully designed with stylish wood cabinetry, tiled countertops, and bar seating- perfect for entertaining or casual dining. The one bedroom layout includes a convenient Jack and Jill bathroom, offering both functionality and comfort, along with washer and dryer. Laminate Floors and Ceiling fans throughout! Ample room outside to build a separate garage. Enjoy beautiful ocean views from the covered lanai, an inviting space for outdoor dining or unwinding at sunset. And additional uncovered lanai provides the perfect setting for sunbathing, star gazing, container gardening or simply soaking in the peaceful surroundings. The covered lanai could easily be screen in to enhance indoor/outdoor living area and bug free environment during evening hours. This property is a Residential CPR situated on a generous 2 acre parcel. The property has it’s own septic system and electric meter with sub-metering water. Whether you are hosting family gathering, heading out for a day of ocean activities, exploring nearby hunting areas, or cultivating your own garden, this property support a wide range of life styles. Located just a 3 minute drive or easy 10 minute bike ride down to the beaches, 5 minutes drive to Maunaloa town with a market & Post Office, 10 minute drive to the airport and only 25 minutes to Kaunakakai town. This property is a rare opportunity to own a piece of what we consider- Paradise!!

89af783f11d15144249f39415449e304.description: Location, location, location! This is a rare opportunity to own a really nice upgraded condo in the B Building at Molokai Shores. Just steps from the beach, this stunning unit offers panoramic ocean views stretching across to Lanai, where you can watch whales breach in the winter and enjoy breathtaking sunrises year-round from your private corner lanai. Inside, the open kitchen and great room feature newer countertops, cabinets, and large tile floors, creating a fresh and inviting space. This condo is being sold fully furnished, making it move-in or rental-ready for your island getaway. This is a fee simple condo. HOA are $1042 a month and cover internet, cable, water, sewer, exterior maintenance, and garbage, offering excellent value and convenience. Molokai Shores has solar so electricity is less. Just a short walk to town or Hotel Molokai restaurant (opening up in July). Great for ocean lovers. There is a storage rack for kayaks and SUP boards. A small putting green with 3 holes and shuffleboard. Community Laundry, florist and hair dresser on property. Owner holds an active RE license. These units rarely come on the market—don’t miss your chance to own this Molokai Shores gem! Schedule your showing today!

01848b94f7ac3cb657ab2cf0c6f6b7ad.description: Discover a rare opportunity to own a beautiful, level lot on Molokai's peaceful east end. Offering just over a half acre, this AG-zoned property provides the perfect setting to build your island home, start a small farm, or create a blend of both. Conveniently located one lot off Kamehameha V Highway, just past the 15-mile marker, the property offers easy access while still maintaining a sense of privacy and rural charm. The property currently has a water meter installed, adding value and convenience for a future home. This parcel presents a wonderful opportunity for owner-occupants seeking to establish a primary residence and enjoy the benefits of Molokai living. Buyers are encouraged to explore all permitted uses under AG zoning to determine suitability for their intended use. The parcel is located within the Special Management Area (SMA) and designated flood zone. Buyers should conduct their own due diligence regarding SMA requirements, flood considerations, building permits, and utility connections. Enjoy the tranquility, open space, and natural beauty that define Molokai's east end. Opportunities like this are limited—secure your piece of paradise today. More photos coming

8dc720e3c0d45ca170f6fec94767108e.description: Rare to the market. A 2-Bedroom with Loft A truly rare offering at Molokai Shores, Unit B317 is a beautifully remodeled 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom fee simple condominium with a full loft—providing extra living space and flexibility. Perched on the top floor with no one above you, this end unit enjoys a peaceful setting where swaying palm trees sit at window level, creating an intimate tropical feel. From your lanai, take in sweeping views across the grounds and pool area, with the island of Lana‘i on the horizon. Inside, the thoughtful remodel makes this home both inviting and practical, ideal as a turnkey short-term rental or personal island retreat. New bedroom furniture, new couch, coffee table, end tables and more!! Molokai Shores is centrally located just minutes from Kaunakakai town and offers resort-style amenities including an oceanfront swimming pool, baby pool, BBQs (gas & charcoal), shuffleboard, putting green, ample parking, community laundry, and the reassurance of an on-site manager and maintenance team. Monthly HOA fees of $1,411.60 cover water, garbage, internet, cable TV, management, and exterior maintenance—keeping ownership simple and stress-free. Highlights: 2 Bedrooms | 2 Bathrooms | Full Loft Rare top-floor END unit, no one above and an extra large size lanai with two separate sliding doors to the lanai. One in living room and one from in the main bedroom, Remodeled & fee simple ownership. Excellent short-term rental potential with Castle Resort, Ocean, Lana‘i & poolside views Resort-style amenities. If you’ve been waiting for a special property on Molokai, Unit B317 is an opportunity you don’t want to miss. Only 3 of this kind are even available at Molokai Shores.

c327bb93f6a00daba183df8c503587b1.description: Welcome to a rare Molokaʻi oceanfront estate property offering space, privacy, and sweeping island views. Situated on a .59-acre lot with an additional adjoining vacant parcel, this impressive property combines luxury living with the relaxed lifestyle Molokaʻi is known for. The main estate home features 5 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and approximately 2,925 square feet of interior living space, complemented by an attached three-car garage and a roundabout driveway with a private automatic entry gate. Designed to take full advantage of its waterfront setting, the home features a large tiled oceanfront lanai, perfect for enjoying views across the channel to Lanai, seasonal humpback whale sightings, and spectacular winter sunsets, all while benefiting from Molokaʻi’s year-round cooling trade winds. Inside, the spacious layout includes a great-room style kitchen with a large island, seated bar, tiled counters, double ovens, and a full walk-in pantry. The kitchen flows into both a formal dining area and an oceanfront breakfast nook, ideal for morning coffee with expansive ocean views. The home also includes a comfortable living room with hardwood floors and beachfront vistas. The primary bedroom suite captures panoramic ocean views right from the bed and includes a luxurious bathroom with a soaking tub and walk-in ice cube shower. Guest bedrooms also enjoy beautiful ocean and garden views. In addition to the main residence, the estate includes a separate 681 sq ft one-bedroom, one-bath ohana cottage, ideal for extended family, guests, or potential rental use. The property is being sold with an additional adjoining vacant lot totaling approximately 15,581 sq ft, complete with its own water meter, offering possibilities for future development, expanded privacy, or additional garden space. The grounds feature spacious lawns, fenced areas, a small greenhouse, and a variety of tropical plants and fruit trees, creating a peaceful island retreat. With no neighbors directly on either side, the property offers exceptional privacy while still being just a short walk to One Aliʻi Beach Park. This is a unique opportunity to own a large oceanfront estate with additional buildable land along Molokaʻi’s scenic coastline—combining privacy, space, and breathtaking island views in one exceptional property.

43aa6773eafcb3bf2a813e92ec463c86.description: Condo #107 at Ke Nani Kai is located on Molokai’s desirable west end, known for its beautiful beaches, excellent surfing, hunting, hiking, bicycling, and peaceful island lifestyle. Enjoy whale watching during the winter months and stunning sunsets year-round just minutes from your door. This ground-floor, corner unit features tiled kitchen countertops, tile flooring, refrigerator, dishwasher, oven hookups, and washer/dryer hookups. With a few cosmetic updates, this condo offers a wonderful opportunity to add your own personal style and create the perfect island retreat, full-time residence, or investment property. Ke Nani Kai offers outstanding amenities including an in-ground pool, hot tub, tennis courts, outdoor BBQ areas, covered lanai picnic pavilion, community garden, and convenient access to nearby west end beaches. HOA dues include cable TV, internet, water, garbage, sewer, exterior maintenance, and professional management, making for easy and comfortable island living.

8e6ad33ca79b39b0d4f50cd70834362c.description: Kawela is known for its expansive ocean views with 2 acres of prime Ag land. Located in Kawela Plantation 1, From this lot you face directly at Lanai and yet you see Maui and the west side of Molokai, which nightly, shows the beautiful colorful nightly sunset sets . Whales in the winter months is also a wonderful blessing to see breaching in the channel between Molokai and Lanai. Very close to town for shopping and convenient to drive east for quaint east end beaches or west for beach walking the Papohaku Beach. 5000 additional acres for hiking and hunting. A great place to live on Molokai. Build your dream home and ohana for you and your family to all live on one parcel. Take advantage of the private water to farm your land. Just a very short drive to launch a small boat and fish over the reef.

f24c6722f87043f218802effb0c6f437.description: Beautifully updated studio at Kepuhi Beach Resort on Molokai’s desirable west side, offering panoramic ocean views and unforgettable sunsets. Unit 1182 is just a short stroll to Kepuhi Beach, Make Horse Beach, and the white sands of Papohaku Beach, this unit is perfectly positioned to enjoy Molokai’s outdoor lifestyle. The thoughtfully designed studio features two queen-size beds, a fully remodeled kitchen, tile flooring throughout, an updated bathroom, and additional storage space—making it both comfortable and functional for personal use or guests. Kepuhi Beach Resort is zoned Hotel and it's amenities include an oceanfront swimming pool, outdoor gas BBQs, ample parking, storage lockers, and beautifully maintained grounds. Located on Molokai’s west end, residents enjoy easy access to world-class surfing, beachcombing, hiking, biking, fishing, hunting, and exploring miles of uncrowded coastline. HOA dues conveniently include electricity, water, sewer, garbage, HOA management, landscaping, and exterior maintenance. A true move-in-ready condo in a stunning oceanfront setting.

ef3d8be16e57f16293d42c9c56dda5a1.description: Priced to sell! Great beachfront opportunity at Molokai Shores, Unit A113. This is a rare fully remodeled ground floor leasehold condo features an open kitchen design and vinyl flooring throughout, offering easy island living just steps from the ocean. Zoned Hotel (H-1) the unit provides excellent flexibility for short term and long term rentals or use as your own full time or part time Hawaiian retreat. The condo comes fully furnished and turn key ready! Molokai Shores offer desirable resort style amenities including an in-ground swimming adults & on for little keikis, putting green, shuffleboard court, gas and charcoal BBQ areas with picnic tables, benches for watching sunset and whales breaching, kayak & stand up paddle board storage rack, easy parking and florist & hairdresser on property. Ideally located near Kaunakakai town and the harbor, where you will enjoy convenient access to shopping, dining and island services. Paddle daily to the beautiful pristine barrier reef that Molokai has to offer. HOA dues include water, gas, internet/cable, community laundry, trash, private sewer, grounds and outside maintenance, providing peace of mind. Owner do pay solar electric. Don’t miss this rare opportunity to own a beautiful ground floor condo ready for your use!!

40d15242598d8a0dec07890db2e9f60f.description: Located on the Island of Molokai at Molokai Shores. Highly desirable C building unit with views of old Hawaiian fish pond, Maui, Lanai, the beautiful Pacific ocean and colorful nightly sunsets. Steps to a quaint secluded beach, well maintained grounds with putting green, nice amenities and conveniently located near town. Unit is currently used as a vacation rental with potential for future income. This second floor has been totally remodeled and turnkey. Very close to parking and away from road noise. Unit is fully equipped and move in ready. Make this your home away from home and paddle every day. Investment property and/or weekend getaway. One of seller is a licensed realtor in the State of Hawaii.

1d6dcf4788b7282076e8ca6d4eee5030.description: Want an inexpensive piece of Paradise? Not typically on the market are condos at Hotel Molokai listed for sale on this very serene island of Molokai. Hotel Molokai is the only hotel on the island. It's located 2 miles from town on the ocean with an excellent open air restaurant on the water where one can see nightly sunsets. You will find an oceanfront pool and hammocks to laze on by the ocean. This cute one room hotel unit is located upstairs so no one is above you. There are 3 beds in the unit, perfect for a family quick stays. The condo has a small kitchenette with double burner, small fridge, microwave and other small appliances to make your stay enjoyable. There is a wonderful tiles covered lanai with table and chairs to relax at the end of your day of adventures. Unit also has a storage loft area that could be turned into additional sleeping space. If you don't feel like cooking at he end of the day, cruise over the Hiro's Restaurant for nightly music and mingle with the locals at the bar. You will also find an activity desk with things to do on the island of Molokai and a cute sundry shop with trinkets and necessities. Because of all this, condo and complex has to offer, this particular condo makes for a great vacation rental. Owner's rent quite well renting through Vacasa’s rental pool. If you don't need much, this condo is perfect for you

07f9d4b1dd5c46d3f8ba2bb7b21999e1.description: Kawela is known for its expansive ocean views with 2 acres of prime Ag land. From this lot you face directly at Lanai and the west side of Molokai, which nightly, radiates the most colorful nightly sunsets. Whales in the winter months is also a wonderful blessing to see breaching in the channel between Molokai and Lanai. Very close to town for shopping and convenient to drive east for quaint east end beaches or west for beach walking the Papohaku Beach or surfing in the winter months. 5000 additional acres for hiking and hunting. Private water with Kawela Plantation. Kawela Plantation has their own beach park to use for gatherings or walking your dogs. Make this your home, it's a great place to live.

961b17d2297ba9e497a07790c8173a3a.description: Kawela is known for its expansive ocean views with 2 acres of prime Ag land. Located in Kawela Plantation 1, From this lot you face directly at Lanai and yet you see Maui in the distance, which mornings, shows the beautiful colorful sunrises. Whales in the winter months is also a wonderful blessing to see breaching in the channel between Molokai and Lanai. Very close to town for shopping and convenient to drive east for quaint east end beaches or west for beach walking the Papohaku Beach. 5000 additional acres for hiking and hunting. A great place to live on Molokai. Build your dream home and ohana for you and your family to all live on one parcel. Take advantage of the private water to farm your land. Just a very short drive to launch a small boat and fish over the reef. Kawela Plantation does have its own beach park for owner's use.

6ad47cceea211ff56620546b3114fec7.description: Experience the beauty of Moloka! This west end from this wonderfully updated 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom Ke Nani Kai condo featuring sweeping, unobstructed ocean views! Every inch of this unit has been thoughtfully remodeled with attention to detail, creating a warm and inviting Hawaiian-inspired retreat. Enjoy a spacious private lanai overlooking the coastline with panoramic views all the way to Oʻahu—the perfect place to watch winter whales, vibrant sunsets, and the ever-changing colors of the Pacific. Inside, the remodeled kitchen showcases a cohesive tropical ambiance with beautiful tiled countertops, stainless steel appliances, a stylish tiled backsplash, and a convenient breakfast bar. The condo features tile flooring in kitchen and bathrooms and wood flooring throughout the rest for easy maintenance and a cool, clean aesthetic. Both bathrooms have been fully renovated with matching finishes, continuing the home’s thoughtful Hawaiian design theme. Most Hawaiian-style furnishings will remain with the condo, offering a turnkey option for buyers. Additional upgrades include an on-demand hot water heater and a solo washer/dryer unit, adding to the convenience of full-time or vacation living. Just outside your door are miles of scenic walking and running trails leading to three of Molokai’s most iconic beaches: Kepuhi Beach, Papohaku Beach, and Make Horse. Ke Nani Kai provides outstanding amenities, including a private resort-style pool, in-ground hot tub, gated tennis and pickleball courts, a BBQ pavilion, an owner’s garden, and beautiful landscaped grounds. Whether you’re looking for a peaceful island home, a vacation escape, or a ready-to-go rental, Ke Nani Kai 242 is a stunning opportunity offering upgrades, comfort, and spectacular ocean views in one of Molokai’s most picturesque settings.

525ae45ad7bf6a2715b3998a32ab8f38.description: Views, Views, Views! Great price adjustment on this highly desirable unit offering one of the most scenic locations in the complex. Relax on your lanai and take in the sweeping views of the oceanfront pool, breathtaking winter sunsets, and the channel crossing toward Lana‘i. During the winter months, enjoy whale watching right from your balcony, along with refreshing tradewinds year-round. Inside, the condo features an easy and functional kitchen-to-living room layout, laminate flooring throughout, and comes fully furnished. The bedroom includes a comfortable queen-size bed, and the bathroom offers a convenient setup with a separate vanity area apart from the toilet and shower room. Zoned Hotel, this unit provides maximum flexibility—ideal for full-time living, a personal vacation retreat, or as a short-term rental opportunity. This leasehold property has a monthly lease fee of $132, in addition to HOA dues that cover exterior maintenance, landscaping, on-site management, water, internet, cable TV, garbage, and sewer. Molokai Shores offers wonderful amenities, including a gated in-ground swimming pool, shuffleboard court, putting green, gas and charcoal BBQ areas, picnic tables, and beautifully maintained tropical grounds featuring a variety of plants and fruit trees. Additional conveniences include a local hairdresser and florist located near the management office. Experience the peaceful oceanfront lifestyle of Molokai with this charming and versatile condo!

3c652fa52078040bbfc0dd477e0839f7.description: Rare Opportunity in the Heart of Kaunakakai Town! Discover an exceptional and versatile property located right in the center of Kaunakakai on the island of Molokai. Currently used as a church and gathering center, this unique offering provides endless possibilities for residential, community, or creative commercial use. Situated on a spacious and level 10,980 sq ft lot, the property offers abundant room for parking, gardening, expansion, or future improvements. The main structure features a large open room with a small stage, perfect for hosting events, meetings, workshops, or reimagining as a living or work space. Toward the rear, you’ll find convenient storage closets and a dedicated music studio area, adding to the flexibility of this one-of-a-kind layout. The fully usable yard is ideal for multiple vehicles, boats, trailers, or project/workshop needs, with plenty of maneuvering space. Two exterior bathrooms are located at the back of the structure, and the property is fully fenced for privacy and security. If you’re seeking a centrally located property with room to grow—and countless ways to make it your own—this rare Kaunakakai

groups.title: Interior Details
fields: Handicap Modified,1 Level,Accessible Approach with Ramp

8df67c485b1231474d163f6e4f548de2.description: Over an acre of oceanfront land in a prime location on Molokai. This property sits on a bluff with a fish pond in front and ocean water to the west. From this lot you will see the most gorgeous sunsets nightly. Six months out of the year the sun sets over the ocean. Morning time, you can sit on the sand and see sunrising over Maui! Winter months the whales are breaching right in the channel in front between Molokai and Lanai. If you are a water person, this parcel is for you. One of the best places for all types of paddling and snorkeling the miles of pristine barrier reef in front of you. Blocked from the heavy trade winds of Maui, yet still feel the breeze. On a low tide one can do a nice 2 mile beach walk. This property does have a county water meter installed. A great spot for an oceanfront dream house.

5981989131fba9175b7ec3f777625701.description: New Price Reduction! Experience true oceanfront living at 2452 Kamehameha V Highway along Molokaʻi’s serene South Shore. This rare 4-bedroom, 2-bath beachfront residence sits on a private 12,000+ sq. ft. lot with panoramic views of Lānaʻi and breathtaking winter sunsets. Designed in classic island pole-house style, the elevated second-story living area creates the sensation of living directly above the sea—where the sound of the waves and cooling tradewinds are part of everyday life. The spacious interior features beautiful bamboo flooring throughout, a large open kitchen with generous cabinetry and multiple skylights, plus washer and dryer conveniently located on the main level. Both bathrooms have been tastefully upgraded with tile floors and custom tiled showers. The living room, dining area, and primary bedroom all showcase unobstructed ocean views, bringing the outdoors in and maximizing Molokaʻi’s natural beauty. Dual covered lanais provide exceptional outdoor living—perfect for entertaining on one side or enjoying peaceful evenings with a glass of wine on the other while watching humpback whales just offshore. Below the home, over 2,000 sq. ft. of shaded workshop and storage space offers flexibility for tools, ocean gear, or future creative use. The landscaped grounds include open lawn, tropical plantings, and mature fruit trees including mango, pomegranate, and citrus—your own private island orchard. Whether you’re a paddler, ocean enthusiast, or seeking a tranquil Molokaʻi retreat, this is a rare opportunity to own a true slice of Hawaiian beachfront paradise at an exceptional new price.

a05ae9e9fcbb23aa727a36d91c353808.description: Nice parcel of land, located up in Maunaloa on the Island of Molokai. Lot is 6229 s/f and sits on the corner. Water and Sewer is $250 to hook up with Molokai Ranch. Fairly level lot and it's been recently cleared. Distance Ocean and Mountain views. Higher elevation on Molokai brings cooler airs for summer months. Just a quick 5 minute drive down to some of Molokai's West end beaches. See sunsets from your property. About 10 minutes to airport and 20 minutes to town. Maunaloa does have a market open daily and post office.

10b7a27c0ad7493e1bbe3022b56b0e38.description: Prime Commercial Opportunity in Historic Maunaloa Town – West End Molokai Discover a rare chance to own commercial property in the heart of Maunaloa, a charming small town on the west end of Molokai. Known for its friendly atmosphere and rich history, Maunaloa features daily conveniences such as a locally owned market, the U.S. Post Office, and the iconic Big Wind Kite Factory – a favorite stop for both residents and visitors. These commercial lots present endless potential to serve the growing needs of the surrounding community, including three west end condominium complexes and the expansive Papohaku Ranchlands residential area. The west end is renowned for its stunning beaches, tranquil lifestyle, and warm sense of community, making it the perfect backdrop for a new business venture. Whether you’re envisioning a café, retail shop, service center, or other community-focused business, this prime location offers the visibility and accessibility to thrive. With limited commercial options on the west end, this is a unique opportunity to invest in a property that can make a lasting impact. Key Features: Located in the center of Maunaloa town High visibility and steady local traffic Serves nearby condos, neighborhoods, and visitors Rare west end commercial property offering Bring your vision and be part of shaping the future of Molokai’s west end. Zoned B-CT, this property falls under guidelines designed to regulate commercial development in a way that respects and preserves the distinct character and charm of Hawaii’s smaller, more rural communities. Owner will carry financing with the purchase of this lot and the neighboring lot together. Call for more information.

81f5d7193fb90694ab5a032a5e08b099.description: rime Commercial Opportunity in Historic Maunaloa Town – West End Molokai Discover a rare chance to own commercial property in the heart of Maunaloa, a charming small town on the west end of Molokai. Known for its friendly atmosphere and rich history, Maunaloa features daily conveniences such as a locally owned market, the U.S. Post Office, and the iconic Big Wind Kite Factory – a favorite stop for both residents and visitors. These commercial lots present endless potential to serve the growing needs of the surrounding community, including three west end condominium complexes and the expansive Papohaku Ranchlands residential area. The west end is renowned for its stunning beaches, tranquil lifestyle, and warm sense of community, making it the perfect backdrop for a new business venture. Whether you’re envisioning a café, retail shop, service center, or other community-focused business, this prime location offers the visibility and accessibility to thrive. With limited commercial options on the west end, this is a unique opportunity to invest in a property that can make a lasting impact. Key Features: Located in the center of Maunaloa town High visibility and steady local traffic Serves nearby condos, neighborhoods, and visitors Rare west end commercial property offering Bring your vision and be part of shaping the future of Molokai’s west end. Zoned B-CT, this property falls under guidelines designed to regulate commercial development in a way that respects and preserves the distinct character and charm of Hawaii’s smaller, more rural communities. Owner will carry financing with the purchase of this lot and the neighboring lot together. Call for more information.

de606207398f1b5b70617192dae96b48.description: Rare East End Molokai Lot with Installed Water Meter Step into a tropical paradise on Molokai’s East End with this rare 1.8-acre property, where towering trees, vibrant greenery, and native foliage surround you in a private, jungle-like setting. Located just off the highway near the 17.5-mile marker, this beautiful lot comes with a county water meter already installed and features a natural clearing—an ideal site to build your dream home in the heart of East Molokai. This property is in a flood zone and is in SMA, and any structures must go through the SMA process. The land offers rich soil, excellent sunlight, and cool breezes through the trees, making it perfect for gardening, farming, or simply enjoying the peaceful beauty of nature. This is a wonderful opportunity for local Molokai families looking to stay close to their roots and loved ones, with the chance to build a home near ‘ohana in a quiet, welcoming community. With nearby access to East End beaches and the town of Puko‘o, this property blends privacy with convenience. Whether you're ready to build now or looking to secure a rare, build-ready parcel for the future, this lot offers unmatched potential, tranquility, and connection to the land.

e1164a561ae9d765b0098918949dd619.description: Great Price Reduction! Charming 3-bedroom, 1-bath single-family home located in the heart of Kualapuu town on the peaceful island of Molokai. This quaint plantation-style residence offers an ideal opportunity for first-time homeowners or Molokai families seeking a property close to ohana. Conveniently situated near schools, parks, shopping, and the Kualapu'u community center, the home provides both comfort and accessibility to walk to the market, schools and park and the coffee shop down the road. Enjoy the spacious covered lanai, perfect for relaxing or entertaining outdoors. The long tandem covered carport accommodates two vehicles, with additional side parking ideal for a boat or trailer. The property is adorned with mature trees including coconut, lilikoi (passion fruit), and pine, creating a lush and tropical setting. With its cozy farmhouse charm and practical layout, this home is a wonderful entry into homeownership in one of Hawaii’s most close-knit island communities. Don’t miss this opportunity to own a piece of Molokai.

4a886ae815e360e8223fd5747bc92161.description: Kawela is known for its expansive ocean views with 2 acres of prime Ag land. This lot sits on a hill side and protected from the blasting trade winds coming from Maui. Its faces the west side of Molokai with beautiful colorful nightly sunset sets . Whales in the winter months is also a wonderful blessing to see breaching in the channel between Molokai and Lanai. Very close to town for shopping and convenient to drive east for quaint east end beaches or west for beach walking the Papohaku Beach. 5000 additional acres for hiking and hunting along with it's own beach park for owners to use. A great place to live on Molokai. Make this your home.

d4710d7e974676baefefc28c2a9d9baa.description: Location, Location, Location in Unit 2222! Experience island living at its finest with this beautifully remodeled loft condo at the Kepuhi Beach Resort, perfectly positioned to capture sweeping ocean views, dramatic sunsets, and seasonal whale sightings right from your lanai. Overlooking the iconic Kaiaka Rock and just steps from the beach, this is the ultimate Hawaiian retreat. Inside, you’ll find a bright and airy open-concept layout featuring an upgraded kitchen with a movable island—ideal for flexible living and entertaining. The remodeled bathroom includes tiled shower walls and an added second closet for extra storage. The spacious loft, accessed by a wide staircase, offers additional sleeping quarters and more room to store your beach gear or personal items. Condo was remodeled in 2006 to add additional loft of about 200 s/f. Located in building 22. Zoned H-1, perfect for short-term rentals, long-term tenants, or your own private getaway. Molokai is a paradise for nature lovers and adventure seekers alike—enjoy surfing, hiking, cycling, hunting for axis deer, or simply strolling along serene, uncrowded beaches. Don’t miss the chance to own a slice of paradise on Molokai—this is island life done right! Kepuhi Beach Resort owner's association dues are at $574/month which includes water, electric, trash, sewer, grounds and outside maintenance. WMA, West Molokai Assoc. is $75 a year. Check out the Youtube walk through video!

c635024d92a57609eb2d09e2ff958095.description: Escape to the serene and rural community of Molokai with this exceptional opportunity to own a condo at Molokai Shores. Nestled on the second floor close to the ocean, this one-bedroom, one-bathroom offers a tranquil retreat with captivating ocean views and trade winds. The condo comes completely furnished. Step onto the covered lanai and immerse yourself in the breathtaking scenery – from witnessing majestic winter whales breaching in the distance to marveling at the colorful sunset skies over the ocean. Located just a mile from town and a short stroll to Hiro's restaurant, where you can indulge in oceanfront dining at its finest. The complex offers a few amenities to enhance your island lifestyle, including a pool and kiddie pool, putting green, BBQ areas with picnic tables, a florist, hairdresser, and community laundry facilities. With a reasonable HOA fees covering water, gas, sewer, trash, grounds maintenance, and exterior upkeep, you can enjoy peace of mind knowing that essentials are taken care of. For water enthusiasts, Molokai's 28 miles of barrier reef beckon, offering endless opportunities for diving, snorkeling, and water sports right at your doorstep. Embrace the laid-back charm and natural beauty of Molokai with this exceptional condo opportunity at Molokai Shores.
